noticias.titulo: Messi has no equals, and if not for him, Argentina would be on a flight home
noticias.resumo: Argentina's unbelievable comeback win over Egypt on Tuesday was all down to Lionel Messi, who is seemingly dragging his team to another final.

noticias.titulo: Argentina, Messi complete epic comeback with VAR drama
noticias.resumo: Argentina muscled their way past Egypt in a game that had everything: Messi magic, VAR drama, underdog brilliance and another unforgettable World Cup moment.

noticias.titulo: Wizards reunite with Mavs' Middleton in sign-and-trade deal
noticias.resumo: The Washington Wizards are bringing back veteran Khris Middleton on a three-year, $17.6 million contract via a sign-and-trade deal, his agent told ESPN's Shams Charania.

noticias.titulo: Tatum: 'Tough' to see Brown go but proud of era
noticias.resumo: Jayson Tatum reflected on the "abrupt ending" of his longtime partnership with Jaylen Brown while appreciating what the pair accomplished together.
Hossam Hassan said Egypt were the victim of an "injustice" in their 3-2 World Cup defeat against Argentina due to FIFA wanting Lionel Messi to "stay in the running."

noticias.titulo: FIFA suspended 2 U.S. officials for Belgium game
noticias.resumo: Two staff members of the United States men's soccer team were suspended by FIFA from Monday's round-of-16 game against Belgium.

noticias.titulo: Fernandez header seals dramatic Argentina comeback
noticias.resumo: Enzo Fernandez scores late to give Argentina the lead against Egypt in their last 16 match at the 2026 World Cup.

noticias.titulo: 'How?!' — Gauff battles into first Wimbledon semi-final
noticias.resumo: Coco Gauff surprised even herself by overcoming her recent grass-court struggles to reach a first Wimbledon semi-final against Karolina Muchova.

noticias.titulo: England players to get hoarding warning after freak Henderson injury
noticias.resumo: England players will be advised not to jump over advertising hoardings after Jordan Henderson suffered a freak injury.

noticias.titulo: Pogacar loses yellow jersey in Tour de France heat
noticias.resumo: Mads Pedersen sprints clear from a breakaway to win the fourth stage of the Tour de France.

noticias.titulo: Inside Liverpool's pre-season plans as Iraola starts work
noticias.resumo: New Liverpool head coach Andoni Iraola has arrived at the club's training ground and is preparing to start work with his new squad ahead of the Premier League season.

noticias.titulo: Russia could compete at LA 2028 Olympics
noticias.resumo: Russian athletes could be allowed to compete for their country at the 2028 Olympic Games in Los Angeles after the International Olympic Committee provisionally lifted their suspension.
